PLFF SHIRLEY BLACK AS TRUSTEE OF BLACK 1991 REVOCABLE TRUST APPEARED WITH COUNSEL, LEONARD MASTROMONACO. DEFT LORETTA BILLS PRESENT AND APPEARED IN PROPIA PERSONA. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD, EMBODIED IN THE "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT", WHICH WAS READ BY PLTF'S COUNSEL ON THE RECORD. DEFT UNDERSTOOD THE TERMS AND AGREED ON TERMS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BILLS, LORETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 68 -5TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO,CA $1,400.83 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.83, STAYED UNTIL NOV-12-1997, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
